title: sorghastrum stipoides
intro: Sorghastrum stipoides, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sorghastrum stipoides include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sorghastrum stipoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
